summary: High‑quality audience recording captures an energetic 1990 Cal Expo show with Garcia’s inspired playing.
review: Sean WS provides a detailed account of his spaced‑omni Schoeps setup and notes that the three‑night DAT capture turned out “pretty fine,” arguably some of the best recordings from those shows. The performance is described as lively, especially noting Jerry Garcia’s energetic guitar work on June 9. Overall both the music and the tape are praised.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers give 5‑star ratings and praise the recording’s fidelity and the band’s performance, though only two reviews limit confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Spaced omni Schoeps MK2 capsules recorded to a Panasonic DAT (SV‑250); positioned close to the front‑of‑house console for balanced, clear capture. Reviewers describe the tapes as “pretty fine” and among the finest recordings of the run.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The show is characterized as energetic and well‑executed, with a strong vibe throughout; Garcia’s playing is highlighted for its intensity.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia was “rocking back and forth… playing his heart out with an energy that filled us all up.”
